parameters.content:
## W13: Calendly Confirmation Email Sender

✅ [STATUS REDACTED — configure after import]

FLOW (no draft path):
Poll Every 30 Minutes → Confirmation Email Config
→ Query Eligible Calendly Trackers
→ Fetch Lead Name → Format Email Data
→ Eligible Trackers Found?
→ Send Live Email
→ Update Tracker — Confirmation Sent

Sender: Example User's Outlook
TO: Lead_Email__c (real Lead email)
CC: colleague@example.com only
Signature: Example User (Founder & CEO)

CONFIG NODE:
- testMode: false = all eligible trackers
- testRecordId: reference only
- batchLimit: 10

Duplicate guard: Calendly_Confirmation_Sent__c = false in query.
Meeting_Source__c = Calendly guard in Format Email Data.
No draft mode — always sends live.

## Query + Fetch
In testMode: queries only testRecordId
  AND enforces Meeting_Source__c = 'Calendly'.
In live mode: queries all eligible Calendly trackers:
  Meeting_Source__c = 'Calendly'
  Meeting_Status__c = 'Scheduled'
  Calendly_Confirmation_Sent__c = false
  Related_Lead__c not null
  Lead_Email__c not blank
  Meeting_Start_Date_Time__c not null
Fetches Lead for FirstName.

## Format + Send
Polls every 30 minutes.
Format: date/time in Lead timezone.
TO: Lead_Email__c
CC: colleague@example.com only (Example User is sender, not CC'd)
Signature: Example User — same Example Company logo as Example Representative's sig.

Always sends live (no draft mode).
After send: Update tracker:
  Calendly_Confirmation_Sent__c = true
  Calendly_Confirmation_Sent_At__c = now
  Last_Synced__c = now

Duplicate send prevention:
  Calendly_Confirmation_Sent__c = false filter in query.
